name: end-to-end registration with validation, admin notification and timezone conversion

payload.text: 👋 Welcome! Tap a button below to get started.
Let's set up your webinar. What's the topic?
Got it. Send the date and time (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM).
Thanks. Send the UTC offset (e.g. +03:00 or -05:00).
Last one — send the broadcast link (or type "none" to skip).

✅ Webinar saved!

📅 Mastering cold outreach
🗓 When: 2026-07-23 15:00 (UTC+03:00)
⏱ UTC: 2026-07-23 12:00
🌐 Broadcast: https://meet.example/abc
Send the admin channel or group id (a negative number, like -1001234567890). You can also forward a message from the channel and I'll grab it automatically.
✅ Admin channel set. New registrations will be posted there.

Let's sign you up for "Mastering cold outreach".

What's your full name? (name and surname)
Please send both your name and surname, e.g. "Anna Smith".
Thanks, Anna! What's your email address?
That email doesn't look right — check the spelling and send it again.
Got it. What's your phone number?
That phone number doesn't look right — send it like +7 999 123 45 67.

Here's what you entered:

👤 Name: Anna Smith
📧 Email: anna@example.com
📱 Phone: +7 999 123 45 67

Does this look right? By confirming you agree to receive reminders about this webinar.

✅ You're registered for "Mastering cold outreach"!

📅 Mastering cold outreach
🗓 When: 2026-07-23 15:00 (UTC+03:00)
⏱ UTC: 2026-07-23 12:00
🌐 Broadcast: https://meet.example/abc

I'll remind you 24 hours and 1 hour before it starts. The calendar invite is below 👇

You're already registered for "Mastering cold outreach".

If you changed your mind, send /cancel to cancel your registration.
